---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report something that's broken or not working as expected
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear, concise description of what's wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What did you expect to happen instead?

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- Device: [e.g. Desktop / iPhone 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 126, Safari]
- Screen size (if a layout issue): [e.g. mobile, tablet, desktop]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
